content.en:
"Copy the talent!"

Ye Tian immediately used the copying talent to investigate the talent of this creature.

This creature is called the Raider, and it has a variety of ultimate ancestral endowments.

But there was a talent that shocked Ye Tian incomparably, because it was not the Ultimate Ancestral Fu, but the Eternal Ancestral Fu.

It was the first time he had seen the Eternal Ancestor.

【Eternal Ancestor: Tribulation】

Ye Tian didn't say a word, and directly copied all those Ultimate Ancestral Endowments, and this Eternal Ancestral Endowment was also copied.

However, when copying this Eternal Ancestral Endowment, Ye Tian obviously felt that it was a little difficult to copy the talent, and it took ten seconds to copy this Eternal Ancestral Endowment.

This was impossible in the past, as he copied any talent in an instant, but it took ten seconds to copy the Eternal Ancestral Endowment.

Obviously, there is a limit to copying talent, and at present, copying the Eternal Ancestor Fu is almost at his limit.

Unless the copy talent can be upgraded again, it is expected to break the limit.

Due to the problem of time, he can't fuse the Eternal Ancestral Endowment: Tribulation now, so he doesn't know what this Eternal Ancestral Endowment is useful for the time being, so he can only wait until he goes back and slowly understand this Eternal Ancestral Endowment.

Ye Tian's arrival naturally did not hide from the supreme-level powerhouses of the six super-famous forces.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, how about helping to resist this beast together?"

A supreme-level powerhouse spoke.

Although it is not very helpful to only come to a third-level powerhouse of the Supreme Ancestor, it is not bad to come to a Supreme Ancestor to delay the time and share it for them.

As for whether Ye Tian will fall, that's none of their business.

However, Ye Tian did not do it immediately.

"Ladies and gentlemen, tell me what the beast is and what is the use, I know that you are here for the beast, it should be of great value, if you give me information, I will help you. Ye Tian said.

Just a little information, the six super-famous forces did not hide it, and directly told Ye Tian.

Suddenly, a piece of information came into Ye Tian's mind.

There is not much content in this information, after all, it is naturally impossible for these six super-famous forces to reveal too much information to him, and only tell him some simple information.

For example, the origin of the beast.

A creature born when an exotic world is completely destroyed, an exotic world will not exist forever, after 10,000 tribulations, an exotic world will be completely destroyed and collapsed, and then the beast will be born.

When the Tribulation Beast absorbs the energy of an Exotic Tribulation, it will fall into a deep sleep, and after a long time, an Exotic Heaven and Earth will be reborn in this area, and a reincarnation will begin again.

A tribulation beast that has experienced one destruction of the exotic world is a tribulation beast, if it has experienced two exotic world destructions, it is a two-tribulation beast, and a tribulation beast that has experienced three exotic world destructions is a three-tribulation beast.

The Dark Forbidden Realm had been destroyed once before, giving birth to a raider that had been sleeping and difficult to detect.

If no one interferes, it will sleep until the day the Dark Forbidden is destroyed.

But now, it's been disturbed.

The value of the robbery beast is very large, it contains the origin rule robbery crystal, once you kill the robbery beast, you will get a lot of origin rule robbery crystal.

As for how many Origin Rule Robbery Crystals can be obtained, these six super-name-level forces did not say.

But Ye Tian guessed that the number of Origin Rule Robbery Crystals must be very large, otherwise it would not attract these six super-famous forces.

"Ancestor of Ten Thousand Laws, you have obtained the information, hurry up and stop it!"

These foreign powerhouses spoke one after another.

"Good!"

Ye Tianying said.

Immediately, he attacked the beast.

Of course, Ye Tian would not show all his strength, only his strength that was stronger than the ordinary third-level Supreme Ancestor.

But even so, it also surprised the six super-famous forces.

Because Ye Tian's cultivation time was very short, he actually had such strength, if he had enough chance, maybe there was a glimmer of hope to be promoted to the invincible ancestor.

As Ye Tian attacked this robber beast, the robber beast noticed Ye Tian and slammed its tail into Ye Tian.

The power and speed of this tail blow were extremely terrifying, and the beast was a creature that ignored time and space, even if Ye Tian was proficient in the Space-Time Ancestor Dao and the space-time class supreme ancestral technique, it would be difficult to dodge this blow.

Rumble!!!!

The tail strike of the robbery beast bombarded Ye Tian's body.

Just when the powerhouses of the six super-name-level forces thought that Ye Tian would be killed in one blow, a defensive supreme ancestral technique appeared on Ye Tian's body.

Golden Body Supreme Ancestral Technique!

Holy Armor Supreme Ancestral Skill!

Hybrid Gang Cover Extreme Ancestral Technique!

One Element Cover Supreme Ancestral Technique!

......

Six defensive supreme ancestral skills were activated at the same time, plus their own defense, and one defensive supreme ancestor, many defenses were superimposed to finally resist this blow.

Of course, the six layers of defense were all shattered, plus the defense supreme ancestor was damaged, and Ye Tian's body was slightly injured.

But at the very least, he blocked it, but he was just knocked away.

"What !!"

"What !!"

One by one, the supreme-level exotic powerhouses were dumbfounded, completely incredulous, Ye Tian actually blocked the blow of the beast, and only suffered minor injuries.

How is this possible?

How powerful the robber beast was, if it weren't for them forming a battle formation, attacking together, and sharing the damage, they wouldn't have been severely injured by the robber.

But Ye Tian was just one person, how could he be able to block the blow of the beast?

"The supreme ancestor of the human race has cultivated six defensive supreme ancestral skills, how afraid of death he is!"

A supreme-level exotic powerhouse said.

The others may not have paid much attention to it at that moment just now, but he did notice that the six defensive supreme ancestral techniques were the reason for Ye Tian's life.

"What, six defensive supreme ancestral skills, terrifying, so to speak, he sacrificed speed, soul defense, and other supreme ancestral skills, specializing in defensive supreme ancestral skills and an attacking supreme ancestral technique, so that's it!"

The other supreme-level exotic powerhouses suddenly realized, and they no longer had doubts.

This kind of supreme ancestor with amazing defensive power, although its strength has reached the third level of the supreme ancestor, but it has great flaws and is easy to target, so the beast is not good at soul attacks, otherwise if it is the same invincible ancestor, one soul attack is enough to kill Ye Tian.

It's a pity that they never know how many supreme ancestral skills Ye Tian will have, and even he doesn't just have six defensive supreme ancestral techniques, but ten defensive supreme ancestral skills.

If he hadn't wanted to hide his strength, the beasts wouldn't have been able to break through all his defenses, and they wouldn't have hurt him at all.

But Ye Tian couldn't kill the robber beast alone, because the defense of the robber beast was really terrifying.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian and the powerhouses of the six super-name-level forces finally waited for reinforcements, but at this time, the powerhouses of the six super-name-level forces were all injured, and Ye Tian also deliberately pretended to be injured.

Bang!!!!

A third-level supreme powerhouse descended, all of them belonged to the six super-name-level forces, and these reinforcements all belonged to this third level, and the number reached twenty-five.

All of a sudden, there were twenty-five more powerhouses of the third level of the supreme powerhouse, and many powerhouses were full of confidence in besieging and killing a robbery beast.
